name: Holori
description: Holori — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in FinOps & Cost Management.

seo.title: Holori Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Holori analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Best for automated build/test/deploy pipelines. Holori offers custom pricing.
pros: Centralized logs, metrics, and traces in one place
cons: Data ingestion pricing can spike unexpectedly
